Replace.Text: +2 [ICON_Food] 食物。农场、种植园改良设施+1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] 生产力。城市必须与河流相邻。
+2 [ICON_Food] Food. Farm and Plantation improvements provide +1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production. City must be adjacent to a River.
所有城市发展加速15%。此城市+1 [ICON_Housing] 住房，6格内所有城市+1 [ICON_Housing] 住房。[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]必须建造在河流旁。
City Growth is increased by 15% in all cities. +1 [ICON_Housing] Housing in this city and +1 [ICON_Housing] Housing to all cities within 6 tiles.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]Must be built next to a River.
解锁建造者建造渔船的能力。[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]+1 [ICON_Food] 食物，+1 [ICON_Production] 生产力。只能在有效资源上建造。[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]如果建在奢侈品资源上，城市则可以利用该资源。

Allows Builders to construct Fishing Boats.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]+1 [ICON_Food] Food and +1 [ICON_Production] Production. Can only be built on valid resources.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]If built on a Luxury Resource, the city can use that resource.
巴比伦特色建筑。+1 [ICON_HOUSING] 住房、+3 [ICON_PRODUCTION] 生产力。淡水单元格产出的 [ICON_FOOD] 食物+1。农场、种植园改良设施+1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] 生产力。城市必须建在河流旁。

Babylon unique building. Provides +1 [ICON_HOUSING] Housing and +3 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production. Fresh water tiles gain +1 [ICON_FOOD] Food. Farm and Plantation improvements gain +1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production. City must be adjacent to a River.
[ICON_TechBoosted] 尤里卡提供88%的 [ICON_SCIENCE] 科技值。每回合的 [ICON_SCIENCE] 科技值-33%。
[ICON_TechBoosted] Eurekas provide 88% of [ICON_SCIENCE] Science cost. [ICON_SCIENCE] Science per turn is reduced by 33%.
所有城市都可进行“里甲”项目，专注于以每回合的城市生产力来转换为 [Icon_Food] 食物（80%）、[Icon_Faith] 信仰值（80%）或者 [Icon_GOLD] 金币（200%）。
All cities can undertake LIJIA projects, converting city Production per turn into [Icon_Food] Food (80%), [Icon_Faith] Faith (80%), or [Icon_GOLD] Gold (200%).
所有城市都可进行“里甲”项目，专注于以每回合的城市生产力来转换为 [Icon_Food] 食物（80%）、[Icon_Faith] 信仰值（80%）或者 [Icon_GOLD] 金币（200%）。10个人口或以上的大型城市，每一个人口便提供+2 [Icon_Gold] 金币、+1 [Icon_Science] 科技值以及+1 [Icon_Culture] 文化值。

All cities can undertake LIJIA projects, converting city Production per turn into [Icon_Food] Food (80%), [Icon_Faith] Faith (80%), or [Icon_GOLD] Gold (200%). Cities with 10+ Population provide +2 [Icon_Gold] Gold, +1 [Icon_Science] Science, and +1 [Icon_Culture] Culture per citizen.
攻城器械
Siege Engines
生产远古、古典和中世纪时代的攻城单位时+50% [ICON_Production] 生产力。
+50% [ICON_Production] Production toward Ancient, Classical, and Medieval siege units.
高爆炸药
High-Explosive Shells
生产文艺复兴及更早时代的攻城单位时+50% [ICON_Production] 生产力。
+50% [ICON_Production] Production toward Renaissance and earlier siege units.
堑壕战
Trench Warfare
生产所有攻城单位时+50% [ICON_Production] 生产力。
+50% [ICON_Production] Production toward all siege units.
中国中世纪特色单位。[ICON_Range] 射程为2的高战斗力远程单位。
Chinese Medieval unique unit. A high-strength ranged unit with [ICON_Range] Range 2.

Row.Text: 防守远程攻击时+10 [ICON_Strength] 战斗力。
+10 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength when defending against ranged attacks.

Replace.Text: 此项目每回合提供等同于此城市生产力80%的 [ICON_Faith] 信仰值。
This project provides [ICON_Faith] Faith per turn equal to 80% of this city's Production.
此项目每回合提供等同于此城市生产力80%的 [ICON_Food] 食物。
This project provides [ICON_Food] Food per turn equal to 80% of this city's Production.
此项目每回合提供等同于此城市生产力200%的 [ICON_Gold] 金币。
This project provides [ICON_Gold] Gold per turn equal to 200% of this city's Production.

Row.Text: 选择哪些城市的市中心会应用平衡产出规则。
Choose which City Centers use the BCY balancing rules.
所有城市的市中心都应用 BCY。
Apply BCY to every city center.
只有首都市中心应用 BCY。
Apply BCY only to the capital city center.
选择市中心产出的平衡方式。
Choose how BCY calculates City Center yields.
标准 BCY 规则：当城市建在原本只有2食物1生产的平地市中心时，补足+1生产。文明特性照常生效；带金币、信仰、科技或文化资源的地块不会因此获得额外生产；若后续显露战略资源，则改用该资源产出。

Standard BCY rules: flat city centers that would otherwise settle as 2 [ICON_FOOD] Food / 1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production gain +1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production. Civilization-specific abilities still apply, non-production resource yields do not gain this bonus, and revealed Strategic Resources replace the bonus with their own yields.
平地市中心固定为3食物1生产，丘陵市中心固定为2食物2生产，并在产出波动时动态重算。

Flat city centers are fixed at 3 [ICON_FOOD] Food / 1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production and hill city centers at 2 [ICON_FOOD] Food / 2 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production, with dynamic recalculation when yields change.
平地至少3食物1生产，丘陵至少2食物2生产；市中心会在基础保障产出和地块结算产出之间取较高值。

Flat city centers guarantee at least 3 [ICON_FOOD] Food / 1 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production and hill city centers at least 2 [ICON_FOOD] Food / 2 [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production; the city center keeps the higher value between guaranteed and tile-derived yields.
